summary: Update Rolling Aggregate to Handle PLINK2 Format

content.text: The MergeCohortPlink stage needs to be updated to handle previous rolling aggregates stored in PLINK2 format (.pgen, .pvar, .psam). This requires adding a new conversion step to the workflow. Key changes: 1. Update resolve_rolling_aggregate to retrieve PLINK2 file paths from Metamist. 2. Create a new job (plink2_to_plink1) to convert a PLINK2 fileset to PLINK 1.9 format. 3. Integrate this new conversion job into the MergeCohortPlink stage, making it a dependency for the merge job.
